title: RGB life
description: Replaces the menu panorama with conway's game of life in the rgb channels.
body:
This is a resource pack that replaces the menu panorama with Conway's game of life, running independently in the red, green and blue channels.

Due to how it works, [GLSL Panorama Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/glsl-panorama) is required. (following this, [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is needed too)

Changing the panorama scroll speed will change the rate at which the game runs, and changing GLSL Panorama Shaders' Quality option will change the resolution.
A circle of living cells is placed around the mouse because why not.

![Example with low resolution](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ffa05f6841e188dd09799661fac6285aa1ccca2.png)
